title: draba alpina var. bellii
intro: Draba alpina var. bellii, also known as the Alpine Whitlow Grass or Mountain Whitlow Grass, is a perennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Draba alpina var. bellii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Draba alpina var. bellii is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to limited research on its safety and efficacy.
